title: Purely Comforting American Swede Tagine
description: A briny, cheese-pull weeknight American dish featuring swede, coconut cream crack, and low-carb friendly ingredients, cooked in a traditional tajine clay vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the cubed swede to the skillet and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked swede, coconut cream, cheddar cheese, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika.
Mix well to combine, then transfer the mixture to a traditional tajine clay vessel.
Cover the vessel with a lid and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
